existing_work_summary: Found existing .golangci.yml with only govet enabled; test files had unhandled error returns; staticcheck deprecated rand.Seed; prealloc warnings in simulation packages; gosec warnings about weak random and integer overflow; high cognitive complexity functions in production chains and simulation. Updated linter config and fixed all violations.
